title: Evernote vs Obsidian
description: Compare Evernote vs Obsidian in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right productivity tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Obsidian emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.6/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Evernote or Obsidian?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Obsidian edges ahead with a 4.6/5 rating. Evernote excels at Note-taking and knowledge management platform for professionals., while Obsidian is stronger for Local-first knowledge management and note-taking application..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Evernote and Obsidian?
faqs.answer: Evernote and Obsidian differ in pricing ($10-20/mo vs Free), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Evernote cheaper than Obsidian?
faqs.answer: Evernote starts at $10-20/mo while Obsidian starts at Free. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Evernote or Obsidian?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for productivity. Obsidian scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Evernote and Obsidian together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Evernote or Obsidian?
faqs.answer: Both Evernote and Obsidian prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which productivity tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Evernote for large teams, while Obsidian may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $10-20/mo pricing.
